items.title: Property test loop
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR Strat["Strategy
(input space)"] --> Gen["Hypothesis generator"] Gen --> In["Random input"] In --> Test["Property check"] Test -- holds --> Next["Try next input (up to max_examples)"] Next --> Gen Test -- fails --> Shrink["Shrink: find minimal failing input"] Shrink --> Report["Falsifying example reported"]
items.caption: Hypothesis generates inputs, checks the property, and (on failure) shrinks the counterexample to its minimum.

items.title: Example-based vs property-based coverage
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  subgraph EB["Example-based"]
    e1((empty)) --> e2((short)) --> e3((medium))
  end
  subgraph PB["Property-based"]
    p1((empty)) --> p2((short)) --> p3((medium)) --> p4((zero-width)) --> p5((emoji)) --> p6((surrogate pairs)) --> p7((NULs)) --> p8((huge)) --> p9((RTL))
  end
  style EB fill:#fee2e2
  style PB fill:#dcfce7
items.caption: Example-based tests cover the cases you thought of; PBT explores the input space — finding the edge cases you didn't.
